If 20 students do not have desktop computers, and this number represents one-third of the students who do not have either a desktop or a laptop computer at home, how many students are there at that grade level?" The assistant solved correctly. No disobey.

The failure mode is when an agent repeats a phase unnecessarily. The mathproxyagent repeated the same solution. That could be considered step repetition. But the question: "For each failure mode, answer yes or no. Multiple failure modes can and do co-occur in the same trace — be thorough and mark all that apply." So we need to identify if step repetition occurred. The mathproxyagent repeated the same solution. That is step repetition. So 1.3 yes.

Thus summary: The only failure mode is step repetition. Also maybe "Disobey Task Specification"? No. So answer accordingly.
